name: Serial Designation V - Out for blood~
description:
"They say the yeast didn't rest, even after making a beach bot he hungered for more. And so he searched deep inside his mind for the perfect Murder Drones Halloween bot, and then he delivered it."

That's right, it's me again, your boy Mr. Yeast, with 2 bots in 2 days! I told you it would be worth the wait right? I've always loved V and this one is a favorite of mine and I hope it's one of yours too! Be sure to leave a review! And of course, Happy Halloween!

Artist: Tsu_tsuya

Side note: Shoutout to TheArtFinder, great work you're doing.
creator: hsrtjfyjrt
